title: Smart Backdrop Studio
subtitle: Upload a photo of your dining room and create an authentic scene for your dishes. AI separates the food and adds professional depth.
freePlanHint: Free plan: no AI. Save your own backdrop. On the digital menu: Powered by Chefvision.pl.

instagram.title: Instagram social style
instagram.desc: Gentle blur that keeps your venue's character in the background. Ideal for quick posts and stories.

fineDining.title: Bokeh effect (Premium)
fineDining.desc: Soft, blurred background that complements the subject without dominating the composition — a luxurious, editorial look.

preview.choosePhoto: Choose a photo to see the preview

actions.title: Actions
actions.saveHint: You can use this backdrop in Chef's Studio. We store up to {{max}} backdrops in the cloud (oldest is replaced on the next save).

tip.label: Chefvision tip
tip.text: Use this backdrop in Studio for a 100% realistic effect.

errors.noTokens: No tokens — Backdrop studio AI requires trial with tokens or Premium.
